summary: Implemented videoClip for 16:9 and 9:16, added darkGradient for 16:9, synchronized outdated preview renderers, fixed scene-validate to resolve exported scene ids like progressBar16x9, and removed remaining var usage from scene index.js files covered by task verification.
notes: spec/standards/00-index.md was not present in this worktree, so no project standard could be read from the documented path.
